title: The Lucent Maze
subtitle: The Lucent MazeObjective of the Event: The main objective of this event was to blend science with entertainment, allowing participants to experience the thrill of navigating through a laser maze while
description: The event “The Lucent Maze” was conducted on 25th August 2025, from 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM in the Sports Room, organized by BVP Optica (OSA Student Chapter). The activity featured two exciting segments Laser Maze and Laser Photography. In the Laser Maze, participants had to skillfully dodge and navigate through glowing beams in a thrilling setup that tested their agility, focus, and strategy. Alongside this, the Laser Photography session provided a creative experience where students posed amidst laser effects to capture their victory in a futuristic style. While some students took on the challenge of the maze, others participated in the photography segment, ensuring that everyone enjoyed a unique blend of science, fun, and creativity.Participants Details: Total no. of participants: 87
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
